# docs/external/

External, reference-only resources kept alongside the project for context. Not part of the 1vmo runtime, not loaded by any app, not enforced by any rule, not depended on by anything in `core/` or the four app entry points.

## Contents

- `the-humanizer/` — External AI writing/review workflow reference provided during project review phase. Author: Avem1984 (r/ClaudeAI), v2.4 (2026-04-19). Source pointer in `the-humanizer/README.md`. Reference only — preserved as-is with no edits and no integration into the 1vmo source/runtime/architecture. Use as a personal Claude-side writing-review skill if you want; do not treat as project policy.
